case_title: SAROYAN, HAVAD MISS VS WESTERN INVENTION SUBMISSION CORP.

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SAROYAN, HAVAD   MISS IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT WESTERN INVENTION SUBMISSION CORP. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
